sentiment.reasoning: Record quarterly revenue growth of 5% is a positive indicator of business health and market demand.

headlines.headline: Jorvix Diagnostics reports record quarterly revenue, up 18% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: An 18% increase in customer acquisition signals strong market demand and potential for future revenue growth.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
